lessons.title: Wireless Networking Fundamentals 📡
lessons.description: Understand how Wi-Fi works: frequencies, channels, and encryption standards.

lessons.title: Wi-Fi Encryption: WEP, WPA, WPA2, WPA3 🔐
lessons.description: Learn the evolution of wireless security and the weaknesses in each protocol.

lessons.title: Setting Up a Wireless Lab & Monitor Mode 📻
lessons.description: Configure your wireless adapter for packet injection and monitoring.

lessons.title: Discovering & Targeting Wi-Fi Networks 🎯
lessons.description: Use airodump-ng to scan for networks and select vulnerable targets.

lessons.title: Cracking WPA/WPA2: The 4-Way Handshake 🤝
lessons.description: Capture the handshake and crack the password using dictionary attacks.

lessons.title: Deauthentication & Evil Twin Attacks 👿
lessons.description: Force clients to disconnect and trick them into connecting to your rogue AP.
